results.title: Toronto Blue Jays vs New York Yankees: Betting Preview
results.summary: The main moneyline and run line odds match the source data, but the game total, tie price, and previous score are not present in the provided source.

issues.claim: The total is set at 7.5 runs, with both the over and under offered at 1.80.
issues.explanation: The source data for the Saturday afternoon Blue Jays vs. Yankees game does not include total (over/under) odds or the 7.5 line mentioned.
The source data for this matchup does not provide a 'Tie' betting line.

issues.claim: After taking the opener 8-5 on Friday
issues.explanation: The source data contains betting odds for upcoming games and does not include scores or results for previous games in the series.

results.title: Alouettes vs Argonauts: Montreal Gets the Edge in CFL Betting Preview
results.summary: The article incorrectly reports the Toronto Argonauts' point spread odds as +125, contradicting the source data value of -125.

issues.claim: Toronto's +125 odds on the spread indicate they're being given a slight chance to compete
issues.explanation: The article states the Argonauts have +125 odds on the spread, but the source data explicitly lists the odds for the Toronto point spread as -125.

results.title: Montreal Stuns Toronto in Overtime Thriller, Hamilton Edges Winnipeg
results.summary: The final scores and winners match the source data, but the article contains logical inconsistencies regarding betting favorites, chronological errors, and unverified future schedule claims.

issues.claim: Montreal's win was especially surprising given the pre-game odds which had the Argonauts as +270 underdogs, with the Alouettes favored at -192.
issues.source: None provided for odds; results confirm Alouettes won 37-30.
issues.explanation: No source odds data was provided to verify these figures. Furthermore, the article describes the result as 'especially surprising' despite correctly identifying the Alouettes as the -192 favorites.

issues.claim: In the second game of the weekend, the Hamilton Tiger-Cats took down the Winnipeg Blue Bombers...
issues.source: game_results show Hamilton played at 00:30 UTC and Montreal played at 23:00 UTC on 2026-06-12.
issues.explanation: The Hamilton vs. Winnipeg game occurred earlier (00:30 UTC) than the Montreal vs. Toronto game (23:00 UTC), making it the first game of the set, not the second.

issues.claim: the highly anticipated clash between Montreal and Toronto scheduled for June 13th.
issues.source: game_results shows Montreal vs Toronto was played on 2026-06-12.
issues.explanation: The source data shows this game was played on June 12th. The article recaps this game as finished but then claims it is 'scheduled' for June 13th in the looking ahead section, which is a contradiction.

issues.claim: The game’s total of 67 points surpassed the projected over/under of 51.5
issues.explanation: Source odds/betting data was not available to verify the projected over/under of 51.5 or 52.5.

results.title: Canada and Bosnia-Herzegovina Battle to Draw in FIFA World Cup Group Stage
results.summary: The article correctly reports the match result but contains a major factual error regarding an impossible upcoming fixture and cites betting data not present in the source.

issues.claim: Canada's next match is scheduled for June 12th at 21:00, where they will face Bosnia-Herzegovina again.
issues.explanation: The source data shows the teams already played on June 12th at 19:00. The claim that they play each other again two hours later on the same day is factually incorrect and impossible in a FIFA World Cup group stage.

issues.claim: Sports Select offering a -154 moneyline for Canada and +300 for Bosnia-Herzegovina; over/under line of 2.5 goals.
issues.explanation: The source data provides game results but does not contain any betting odds, moneylines, or over/under values.

results.title: Pirates Fall Short in Miami, Marlins Pull Off Surprise Victory
results.summary: The article correctly reports the score and winner but incorrectly identifies the game's location and contains conflicting information regarding the betting odds.

issues.source: The source data lists 'Pittsburgh Pirates' as the homeTeam and 'Miami Marlins' as the awayTeam.
issues.explanation: The source data indicates the Pirates were the home team, meaning the game was played in Pittsburgh, not Miami as the article claims.

issues.claim: Marlins... were listed as +265 underdogs... Sports Select offering odds of +265 on the Pirates... which had the Pirates as significant underdogs.
issues.source: Source data does not contain betting odds.
issues.explanation: The article contradicts itself by first labeling the Marlins as the +265 underdogs and then labeling the Pirates as the +265 underdogs. Additionally, no source odds data was provided to verify these claims.

results.title: CFL Preview: BC Lions at Saskatchewan Roughriders
results.summary: The article's moneyline odds and scheduling are correct, but the point spread differs slightly and the game total is not present in the source data.

issues.explanation: The source data for the Saskatchewan vs BC game does not include a point total (over/under).
The source data lists the point spread as -2, whereas the article reports -2.5.

results.title: Hamilton Stuns Winnipeg with 37-27 Victory in Battle of the Prairie
results.summary: The final score, winner, and date match the source data, but the betting context and division standings claims are unverified.

issues.claim: Pre-game odds had the Blue Bombers as -105 moneyline favorites against Hamilton, who were listed at +170.
issues.explanation: Betting odds and lines are not present in the provided source data.

issues.claim: secure a crucial win in the Western Division
issues.explanation: The source data confirms the league is CFL but does not provide division information to verify this specific claim.

Mets vs Cardinals Preview: A Value Bet on the Underdog Mets
results.summary: The source data does not contain records for a Mets vs. Cardinals game on June 11th, nor does it include betting odds to verify the article's claims.

issues.claim: The New York Mets face off against the St. Louis Cardinals... at 7:10 PM ET on June 11th.
issues.explanation: The provided source data begins on June 12th and does not include results or schedules for June 11th. Notably, the source shows the Mets playing the Braves on June 12th and the Cardinals playing the Twins on June 13th.

issues.claim: Mets listed at +100 and the Cardinals at +175
issues.explanation: No source odds data was provided to verify the betting lines or the claim that the Cardinals were favorites (which contradicts the listed odds where +100 is 'shorter' than +175).

results.title: Mets Stun Cardinals in Upset Victory, But Odds Hint at Big Surprises Ahead
results.summary: The source data does not contain the Mets vs. Cardinals game described in the article, as the provided results only cover June 12 and 13, 2026.

issues.claim: The New York Mets delivered a stunning upset victory over the St. Louis Cardinals... 5-4 victory.
issues.explanation: The source data provided only covers games from June 12 and June 13, 2026. It does not contain the Wednesday (June 10) game between the Mets and Cardinals described in the recap.
